name: io.github.Muvon/octocode
description: AI-powered code indexer with semantic search and knowledge graphs

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search codebase by meaning — finds code by what it does, not exact symbol names. Prefer an array of related terms over a single query for broader coverage.

oneOf.description: Descriptive phrase about what the code does (not a symbol name)
Array of related search terms — finds all related code in one call

query.description: String or array of strings describing functionality to find. Array preferred for comprehensive results.

mode.description: Content type filter: 'code' (functions/classes), 'text' (plain text), 'docs' (markdown/README), 'commits' (git commit history), 'all' (default, excludes commits)

language.description: Filter code results by language (rust, python, typescript, go, etc.)

tools.name: view_signatures
tools.description: Extract function signatures, class definitions, and declarations from files without implementation bodies. Supports Rust, JS/TS, Python, Go, C++, PHP, Ruby, Bash, JSON, CSS, Svelte, Markdown.

tools.name: structural_search
tools.description: Search or rewrite code by AST structure using ast-grep pattern syntax. Finds code matching structural patterns like '$FUNC.unwrap()', 'if let Some($X) = $Y { $$$ }'. Optionally rewrite matches using a template with metavariable substitution. Complements semantic_search: use this for structural/syntactic patterns, semantic_search for meaning-based queries.

pattern.description: AST pattern using ast-grep syntax (e.g. '$FUNC.unwrap()', 'if err != nil { $$$ }')

language.description: Language to search (required: rust, javascript, typescript, python, go, java, cpp, php, ruby, lua, bash, css, json)

paths.description: File paths or glob patterns to search (default: current directory)

context.description: Number of context lines around matches

rewrite.description: Rewrite template with metavariable substitution (e.g. '$VAR.expect("reason")'). When provided, matched code is rewritten.

update_all.description: Apply rewrites to files in-place. When false or absent, returns a diff preview. Requires rewrite parameter.

tools.name: graphrag
tools.description: Knowledge graph operations over the indexed codebase. Use for architectural queries: component relationships, dependency chains, data flows. For simple code lookup use semantic_search instead.

operation.description: 'search' (semantic node search), 'get-node' (node details), 'get-relationships' (node connections), 'find-path' (path between two nodes), 'overview' (graph stats)
